message:
fix(tests): restore PathBuf import on all platforms

Over-gated PathBuf behind cfg(target_os = "linux") in my earlier
fix, but the cache_and_data_paths_are_rooted_in_expected_dirs test
uses PathBuf on every platform. Keep PathBuf imported
unconditionally; gate only the Linux-only test harness (ENV_LOCK,
env_lock, EnvGuard, TestDir).
